site.name: Coordenada Geo
site.tagline: A consultancy specialised in geospatial technologies
site.description: Coordenada Geo is a consultancy specialised in geospatial technologies that turns spatial data into applied knowledge to support strategic decisions about the territory.

hero.title: Spatial data turned into applied knowledge
hero.subtitle: We work at the interface of science, technology and management, developing analysis, diagnostics and tailor-made solutions — with scientific rigour, close collaboration and a social-environmental purpose.

about.title: At the interface of science, technology and management
about.body: Coordenada Geo is a consultancy specialised in geospatial technologies that turns spatial data into applied knowledge to support strategic decisions about the territory. We develop analysis, diagnostics and tailor-made solutions, guided by scientific rigour, the Agile Manifesto and close client collaboration. Our foundations are trust, technical precision and transparency.
bullets: Intelligent, objective and accessible communication — didactic and collaborative.
Scientific rigour combined with iterative delivery inspired by the Agile Manifesto.
A team that conveys trust, precision and transparency on every project.

purpose.title: Applied knowledge for more conscious decisions about the territory
purpose.body: To turn geographic data into applied knowledge that supports more conscious decisions about the territory. We integrate science, technology and technical experience to make spatial information clear, accessible and useful.

items.title: Technical precision
items.body: Scientific rigour when choosing methods, datasets and validations, without sacrificing clarity.

items.title: Collaboration
items.body: We build solutions close to the client, integrating technical and domain expertise.

items.title: Adaptability
items.body: We adjust scope, tools and deliverables to the reality of each project and scale.

items.title: Social-environmental purpose
items.body: We prioritise initiatives that generate positive impact on people, territories and ecosystems.

services.title: End-to-end applied geospatial technology
services.intro: Tailor-made solutions in remote sensing, geoprocessing and spatial analysis — from assessment to operation.

items.title: Remote sensing
items.body: Image classification, land use and land cover monitoring, change detection and time series.

items.title: Geoprocessing and spatial analysis
items.body: Geographic data modelling, map algebra, spatial statistics and territorial studies.

items.title: Dashboards and visualisation
items.body: Interactive maps and web panels to follow indicators, areas of interest and time series.

items.title: Automation and data pipelines
items.body: Geospatial ETL, integration with public APIs and orchestration of collection, processing and publishing.

items.title: Custom geospatial platforms
items.body: Development of geospatial web applications and APIs, from prototype to production.

items.title: Training and technical support
items.body: Training, code reviews and mentoring for teams working with geographic data.

platform.title: Our geospatial platform to operate at scale
platform.body: We build and operate a proprietary SaaS platform that brings geospatial technologies into our clients day-to-day: layer catalogue, automations, APIs, dashboards and dedicated workspaces — with on-demand access and plans aligned to the agreed scope.

items.title: Environment and climate
items.body: Monitoring of vegetation cover, protected areas, climate risk and environmental liabilities.

items.title: Infrastructure and logistics
items.body: Route planning, network analysis, asset evaluation and territorial impact.

items.title: Public sector and territorial policy
items.body: Inputs for urban planning, land regularisation and programme monitoring.

items.title: Agriculture and land use
items.body: Property characterisation, agricultural suitability and land use and occupation dynamics.

blog.title: From our radar
blog.subtitle: Notes from the team on geospatial tech, methods and projects.
blog.empty: We will publish our first articles soon.

contact.title: Let's talk about your geospatial challenge
contact.body: Share the project context, goals and timeline. We reply with an initial approach within a few business days.

footer.tagline: A consultancy specialised in geospatial technologies. We turn spatial data into applied knowledge for more conscious decisions about the territory.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The content you are looking for may have been moved or does not exist yet.

platform.title: Our platform is almost ready
platform.body: We are putting the finishing touches on Coordenada Geo's geospatial platform — layer catalogue, automations, APIs and dashboards. Early access will be rolled out gradually to our first clients. In the meantime, talk to our team to learn about the roadmap or join the beta programme.
platform.eta: Launch plan: on-demand access opening in stages.
platform.contactHeading: Want to be notified at launch or join the beta? Get in touch.
